descriptions.text:
Ninja is a fast-paced, arcade style action-adventure. The game features highly detailed environments, a wide range of special effects and huge end-of-level bosses.

Assuming the role of the young ninja Kurosawa, you must guide him through a series of progressively difficult environments. The Ninja is able to collect magic potions, scrolls, extra lives, energy and weapons throughout the levels to help him on his quest.

Ninja: Shadow of Darkness is a 1998 action beat 'em up platform video game developed by Core Design and published by Eidos Interactive for the PlayStation. The story follows a warrior named Kurosawa, who is tasked of ridding Feudal Japan of an unspeakable evil.
Ninja : L'Ombre des ténèbres (Ninja: Shadow of Darkness) est un jeu vidéo d'action-aventure sorti sur PlayStation en 1998. Il a été édité par Eidos Interactive et développe par Core Design.
Ninja: Shadow of Darkness è un videogioco d'azione in stile picchiaduro a scorrimento sviluppato da Core Design e pubblicato da Eidos Interactive nel 1998 per PlayStation.
